feature_name: rear-window dominant DeltaR wavelength under d_PVK
explanation: Tracks whether thickness-induced response stays centered in the same rear-window region across ensemble members.
Measures how much total-response amplitude depends on the band-edge prior.

feature_name: rear-window dominant DeltaR wavelength under rear-BEMA
explanation: Checks whether rear-BEMA remains localized in the same spectral neighborhood across ensemble members.
Measures whether rear-BEMA amplitude is stable or heavily contaminated by band-edge prior uncertainty.
Captures how strongly thickness conclusions near the band edge depend on the surrogate family.
Captures how strongly rear-BEMA conclusions near the band edge depend on the surrogate family.

feature_name: absolute R_total at 780 nm under d_PVK
explanation: Represents a band-edge-local observable expected to be more surrogate-sensitive than rear-window fringe metrics.

feature_name: absolute R_total at 780 nm under rear-BEMA
explanation: Represents a band-edge-local observable expected to be more surrogate-sensitive than rear-window envelope metrics.
